'''dathasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hubber|hubber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hubber|hubber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dathasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæthæshæth|dæthæshæth]] || [[word:dæthæshæj|dæthæshæj]] || [[word:dæthæshæsh|dæthæshæsh]] || [[word:dæthæshæ|dæthæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dathathashath|dathathashath]] || [[word:dathathashaj|dathathashaj]] || [[word:dathathashash|dathathashash]] || [[word:dathathasha|dathathasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dathashath|dathashath]] || [[word:dathashaj|dathashaj]] || [[word:dathashash|dathashash]] || [[word:dathasha|dathasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dathafshath|dathafshath]] || [[word:dathafshaj|dathafshaj]] || [[word:dathafshash|dathafshash]] || [[word:dathafshaf|dathafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dathashatha|dathashatha]] || [[word:dathashaja|dathashaja]] || [[word:dathashasha|dathashasha]] || [[word:dathashaka|dathashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dathashath|dathashath]] || [[word:dathashaj|dathashaj]] || [[word:dathashash|dathashash]] || [[word:dathasha|dathasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dathashathal|dathashathal]] || [[word:dathashajal|dathashajal]] || [[word:dathashashal|dathashashal]] || [[word:dathashakal|dathashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dathashathatha|dathashathatha]] || [[word:dathashajaja|dathashajaja]] || [[word:dathashashasha|dathashashasha]] || [[word:dathashaka|dathashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dathashathan|dathashathan]] || [[word:dathashajan|dathashajan]] || [[word:dathashashan|dathashashan]] || [[word:dathashakan|dathashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dathashathaoro|dathashathaoro]] || [[word:dathashajaoro|dathashajaoro]] || [[word:dathashashaoro|dathashashaoro]] || [[word:dathashakaoro|dathashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
